jurisdiction: Municipio de Los Cabos, Baja California Sur

corrections.description: Authority required supplemental documentation: hydrologic study addendum showing CONAGUA approval for the 15m setback designation and certification that the riparian buffer zone is not being impacted by any structure footprint.
corrections.resolution_notes: Hydrologic study addendum submitted with CONAGUA approval letter confirming 15m setback designation. Stream buffer plan redrawn to clearly show no structure footprint within the zone. Permit authority accepted resubmission.
